intro.heading: Who Are We
intro.description: We are a close-knit, devoted community of families residing in Cambridgeshire, united by our shared spiritual journey. Together, we regularly gather to organize Satsangs, offering prayers and seeking divine blessings. Our community is built on the foundation of love, devotion, and service to one another.

cta.heading: We warmly invite everyone to our Satsang
cta.description: Join us in our spiritual gatherings where we come together in devotion, share teachings, and experience the warmth of community.
cta.socialText: Follow us on Facebook for updates

subscribe.heading: Subscribe
subscribe.description: Sign up to be the first to know about our upcoming events and gatherings.
